name: @gana-v8/control-plane-runtime
description: Shared persisted queue runtime and automation cycle coordination for Hermes scheduler, dispatcher, and recovery.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/public-api build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/queue-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/scoring-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/publisher-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/validation-worker build && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @gana-v8/public-api build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/queue-adapters build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/research-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/scoring-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/publisher-worker build && pnpm --filter @gana-v8/validation-worker build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.clean: node --eval "import('node:fs/promises').then(fs => fs.rm('dist', { recursive: true, force: true }))"
